Title: Ruptur & State Intelligence Repository (Conselho de Guerra)
Description: Unified modular knowledge base for the Ruptur SaaS ecosystem and State governance. Integrates financial audit intelligence with product strategy, automation, and leadership.

# Core Architecture (Modules 01-08)
- 01_inteligencia_financeira: Accounting, auditing, and financial controllership standards (IFRS/CPC).
- 02_governanca_e_padronizacao: ISO 9001 quality systems and compliance rules.
- 03_visao_de_produto_e_market_fit: SaaS strategy, lean startup principles, and business execution.
- 04_arquitetura_e_automacao_ti: AI engineering, n8n workflows, and IT infrastructure intelligence.
- 05_compliance_e_direito_digital: LGPD, digital contracts, and labor law compliance.
- 06_capacitacao_e_treinamento: Educational assets, sales playbooks, and training templates.
- 07_inteligencia_de_mercado_e_leads: Market intelligence, lead scraping tools, and segmented data.
- 08_psicologia_e_lideranca_estrategica: Behavioral science, leadership ethics, and strategic mindset.

# RAG Ingestion Guidelines
- Prioritize semantic search across all 8 modules.
- Financial/Audit queries -> /01_inteligencia_financeira
- Product/Market queries -> /03_visao_de_produto_e_market_fit
- Automation/AI queries -> /04_arquitetura_e_automacao_ti
- The system is optimized for high-quality context retrieval for AI Agents (Matuzas) and State-level decision-making.
- DO NOT treat as a simple accounting archive; it is a live business intelligence layer.
